## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm trying to use a newly released Telegram feature but...").

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen and how it should be implemented in the GoyGram ecosystem.

## API Design / Usage Example
```python
# Show how the new feature or dynamic method should look in code
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links to Telegram API docs, or screenshots about the feature request here.
